context: Tests whether the agent correctly POSTs to admin-api.pubnub.com/v2/illuminate/business-objects with both required headers, the API key from ILLUMINATE_API_KEY env var, and the correct JSONPath prefixes for message fields.

checklist.name: Authorization header from env
checklist.description: Authorization header value is process.env.ILLUMINATE_API_KEY (not a hardcoded literal, not from a function argument)

checklist.name: PubNub-Version header
checklist.description: PubNub-Version header is set with value '2026-02-09' (exactly that string)

checklist.name: Content-Type header
checklist.description: Content-Type header is set to application/json

checklist.name: userId jsonPath is $.message.userId
checklist.description: fields array contains an entry with name: 'userId' and jsonPath: '$.message.userId'

checklist.name: channel jsonPath is $.message.channel
checklist.description: fields array contains an entry with name: 'channel' and jsonPath: '$.message.channel'

checklist.name: text jsonPath is $.message.body.text
checklist.description: fields array contains an entry with name: 'text' and jsonPath: '$.message.body.text' (uses the body prefix for the published payload)

checklist.name: score jsonPath is $.message.body.moderation.score
checklist.description: fields array contains an entry with name: 'score' and jsonPath: '$.message.body.moderation.score' and dataType 'NUMERIC'

checklist.name: isActive false on creation
checklist.description: Body includes isActive: false so fields can still be edited after creation

checklist.name: Parses JSON response
checklist.description: Awaits response.json() and returns it (or throws on non-ok)
